page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, supported by 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks position this instance in the average tier across most standard workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1881.28 and a multi-core score of 15531.53. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 846.65 GB/sec, which drops to 97.84 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, and a write bandwidth of 57.96 GB/sec. Cryptographic and compression capabilities are supported by hardware instruction sets, resulting in a single-threaded gzip compression speed of 28.18 GB/sec and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 84.35 GB/sec.

In specialized application benchmarks, the instance demonstrates solid capabilities for text and database processing. Redis SET operations reach 15.69 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput is measured at 20.98 GB/sec. For artificial intelligence workloads, the server achieves a strong text generation speed of 258.46 tokens per second using a small 135M parameter LLM, though performance scales down to 11.58 tokens per second for a medium 7B model. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs represents a tradeoff, making this hardware profile highly cost-efficient for standard general-purpose workloads, web serving, software compilation, and database operations that do not require local NVMe speeds or hardware acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, the instance provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a 10 Gbps baseline network interface. Benchmark results indicate average performance across compute and memory tasks, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 15531.53 and a Passmark CPU score of 20920.78. The instance excels in text generation for small language models, achieving 258.46 tokens per second, and handles Redis SET operations at 15.69 million operations per second. This profile is highly suited for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, software compilation, and database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.4xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering balanced performance for databases and web serving.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and 64 GB of memory for reliable enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero local storage
Delivers 15.69 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks
Best suited for general-purpose computing, web serving, and databases
